summary: Website for creative team management at an Amazon marketing agency. Tracks creative work with completion dates and Amazon upload dates. Allows uploading/viewing images of creatives. Requires classy, professional UI.
architectural_notes: Focus on Amazon marketing agency workflow
Two key dates per creative: completion date and Amazon upload date
Image upload and display capability required

existing_features.title: Implement image upload functionality allowing users to upload creative images as static assets, storing references in the creative project records
Create a dashboard view displaying all creative projects in a grid or list format, showing title, both dates (completion and Amazon upload), and thumbnail images
Implement a form interface to add new creative projects with fields for title, description, completion date, Amazon upload date, and image upload
Implement detailed view for individual creative projects showing full image, all metadata, and edit/delete actions

Design and implement a sophisticated, professional visual theme with elegant typography, refined color palette (avoiding blue and purple), refined spacing, and polished UI components that convey professionalism suitable for an agency setting

new_feature_requests.summary: Track creatives with completion and Amazon upload dates
Create a backend data model to store creative projects with fields: title, description, completion date, Amazon upload date, and associated image URLs
Implement backend endpoints to create, read, update, and delete creative projects
